name: Onion Knockwurst Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and cut them into thin slices to measure about 4 cups.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet.
3. Stir in the onions and parsley. Saute over medium heat until golden brown.
4. Meanwhile, halve the sausages lengthwise and score them crosswise in two places.
5. Dip the cut sides in flour.
6. Push the onions to one side of the skillet.
7. Pour in the remaining 3 tablespoons of oil.
8. Add the sausages. Fry until the sausages are crisp and browned.
